tagline: The WhatsApp-First Automation Platform for Clinics & Med Spas

challenge.headline: Manual Processes Are Costing Clinics Every Day
challenge.description: Clinics rely on disconnected tools and manual follow-ups, causing delayed responses, missed appointments, and lost revenue. Staff spend hours on routine tasks that should be automated.

result.headline: 5x ROI and 40+ Hours Saved Every Month
result.quote: One client recovered +$5,000 USD/month in lost appointments from faster follow-ups alone.
